name: rsi_autotune_walkforward
edge_thesis: 在 IS 窗口内用每次只改一个变量的爬山反思调 RSI 多头参数, 冻结后检验 OOS 是否稳定优于静态 RSI 与 BTC buy-and-hold
null_hypothesis: 单变量爬山只是拟合 IS 噪声, OOS 不优于静态参数, 也不优于 buy-and-hold
promotion_policy: candidate-only; requires walk-forward OOS stability, full costs, and superiority versus both buy-and-hold and static RSI before any further review
